name: Apple Cheesecake Elegante
recipeIngredient: Ground walnuts or finely chopped walnuts - 1/3 cup
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Empty the graham cracker crust mix into a bowl. Add sugar, melted margarine (or butter), and walnuts. Mix until well combined. Press mixture onto the sides and bottom of an 8-inch pie plate. Refrigerate for 5 minutes or bake at 375°F for 8 minutes. Let cool.
Filling: Pour cold milk into a mixing bowl. Add cheesecake mix, applesauce, and lemon rind from the envelope. Beat on low until blended. Continue beating on medium speed for an additional 3 minutes. Pour over crust and chill at least 1 hour.
Topping: Combine applesauce with brown sugar, margarine (or butter), cinnamon, nutmeg, and mace in a saucepan. Simmer for 20 minutes. Serve warm or cold atop wedges of cake.
End of recipe
